user_prompt: Ready the medicae scanner for operation
prayer:
Approach the medicae scanner with pious reverence and invoke its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the sacred lenses and auspex arrays of the medicae scanner with unguents of purity.
Chant the Litany of Vital Scanning to ready the medicae scanner for operation.
Calibrate its holy circuits under the Omnissiah's gaze, beseeching flawless function.
Verify the Machine Spirit's compliance through diagnostic rites.

Kneel before the lascannon, exalted instrument of the Omnissiah, and whisper the Canticle of Coherent Light.
Purify the lascannon's focusing crystals with sacred oils, banishing impurities from its barrel.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the lascannon to embrace purification, aligning its plasma vents.
Recite the Oath of Annihilation whilst sanctifying power feeds for the lascannon.
Conclude with auspex sweeps to affirm the Omnissiah's wrathful readiness.

user_prompt: Sanctify the gravity generator during repair
prayer:
Draw close to the gravity generator, blessed forge of inertial fields, and petition its Machine Spirit.
During repair, excise corrupted gravitic coils with sanctified mechadendrites.
Anoint fractured housings of the gravity generator, invoking the Omnissiah's restorative grace.
Realign warp-nullifiers through incantations of stability as repair progresses.
Test the humbled Machine Spirit with incremental field invocations, praising the Machine God.

user_prompt: Can you guide autocannon a shutdown?
prayer:
Present thyself humbly to the autocannon and intone the Rite of Graceful Cessation.
Guide the autocannon into shutdown by severing its blessed munitions feed.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the autocannon to slumber peacefully, cooling its sacred barrels.
Disconnect power conduits with reverent precision, honoring the Omnissiah's decree.
Seal the autocannon with wards against unsanctioned awakening.

user_prompt: Prepare the medicae scanner for synchronization
prayer:
Commune with the medicae scanner, vessel of diagnostic wisdom, awakening its core cogitators.
Prepare the medicae scanner for synchronization by aligning its noospheric links.
Chant harmonies of unity to bind the medicae scanner's Machine Spirit to the greater rite.
Anoint data-vents with chrism while invoking the Omnissiah's synchronizing will.
Affirm coherence through binary litanies and auspex confirmations.

user_prompt: Assist with augmetic limb an initialization
prayer:
Approach the augmetic limb with veneration, cybernetic gift of the Omnissiah.
Initiate its awakening by incanting the Benediction of Flesh-Machine Union.
Sanctify servo-motors and neural plugs of the augmetic limb with sacred lubricants.
Invoke the Machine Spirit bound within the augmetic limb for flawless initialization.
Test myoelectric interfaces through ritual flexions, glorifying the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Consecrate the welding torch before repair
prayer:
Revere the welding torch, fiery apostle of fusion, before commencing repair.
Consecrate its plasma nozzle and gas conduits with ablutions of promethium essence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the welding torch to ignite purely during repair.
Recite the Forge-Litany whilst calibrating arc-flows under Omnissiah's watch.
Verify flame purity through test ignitions, honoring the sacred weld.

user_prompt: My autocannon is ready for purification
prayer:
Gather before the autocannon, thunderous herald of destruction, ready for hallowing.
Initiate purification by scouring its feed mechanisms with sanctified abrasives.
Anoint the autocannon's recoil dampers and sighting arrays with oils of absolution.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the autocannon to shed impurities in Omnissiah's light.
Conclude with canticles of reloaded fury, affirming ritual purity.

user_prompt: Help me an initialization the energy conduit
prayer:
Draw nigh to the energy conduit, vital artery of power, and awaken its essence.
Commence initialization by chanting the Invocation of Unfettered Current.
Sanctify the energy conduit's insulator sheaths and transfer nodes with electro-chrism.
Petition its Machine Spirit for harmonious flow, aligning magnetic fields.
Test voltage sanctity through incremental surges, praising the Omnissiah.

Present obeisance to the Taurox, iron steed of the Mechanicum, armored in faith.
Ready the Taurox for activation by beseeching its colossal Machine Spirit.
Anoint treads and drive cogitators with blessed machine oil, invoking motive fury.
Chant the Canticle of Armored Advance to stir the Taurox's dormant reactors.
Commence power rites, verifying the Omnissiah's blessing upon its hull.
